overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai walking through a dense bamboo forest, passing through a small settlement with traditional Japanese structures, and ascending toward a coastal overlook with the ocean visible in the distance.

events.description: campfire smoke becomes visible through the bamboo trees ahead indicating a settlement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through the tall bamboo forest toward the distant smoke

entered.detail: tall dense bamboo stalks surrounding the path on all sides
narrow winding dirt trail with scattered leaves and bamboo debris
simple wooden fence marking the edge of the path
smoke rising from a fire in the settlement ahead
large boulders and rock formations alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a dense bamboo forest along a narrow dirt path. Tall bamboo stalks surround the trail, filtering bright midday sunlight. Smoke from a distant campfire becomes visible ahead, indicating an approaching settlement.

events.description: game UI appears indicating 'Yoki's Crossroads' location and 'Hold Standoff' prompt
character walks past a wooden cart and continues through the settlement area

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement observing the surroundings and passing wooden structures

notable_agents.action: villager standing near the stone formation beside the path
figure standing near the wooden cart observing the surroundings

entered.detail: traditional wooden cart with large wheels parked beside the path
wooden torii-style gate marking the settlement entrance
large rocky outcrop with villagers standing on top
burning fire with smoke rising from the center of the settlement

segments.scene_description: The samurai enters a small forest settlement marked by wooden structures and a campfire. Game UI appears indicating 'Yoki's Crossroads.' The character passes a wooden cart and gate while NPC villagers stand near stone formations. The dense bamboo gives way to a more open camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal mountain trail with ocean vista

events.description: exits the settlement into open bamboo forest as the ocean becomes visible in the distance
ocean view opens up fully to the right with distant coastline and temple visible

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the winding path as the landscape opens to reveal the ocean vista

entered.detail: vast blue ocean visible through gaps in the bamboo forest
golden-roofed temple structure visible on the distant coastline

segments.scene_description: Leaving the settlement behind, the samurai ascends a forest trail as the landscape opens to reveal a stunning ocean vista. The bamboo forest continues but becomes less dense, allowing views of the distant coastline and a golden temple structure. The path winds uphill toward the overlook.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a dense bamboo forest into a small settlement and finally up toward a sweeping coastal overlook. It begins along a narrow dirt path where tall bamboo stalks filter bright midday sunlight, moving forward as smoke from a distant campfire signals an approaching village. As the samurai enters the settlement of Yoki's Crossroads, the dense greenery gives way to an open camp area featuring wooden structures, a cart, and villagers gathered near stone formations. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the village behind to ascend a winding forest trail, where the bamboo thins to reveal a stunning ocean vista. The path continues uphill, gradually opening the landscape to showcase the distant coastline and a golden temple structure under a clear sky.
